toolSpec.name: investigate_account
toolSpec.description: Retrieves account investigation data including address validity, email patterns, website verification status, business description, account status, account age, and basic violation history

account_id.description: Unique identifier for the account to investigate

toolSpec.name: analyze_traffic_patterns
toolSpec.description: Retrieves traffic and transaction data including revenue amount, click-through rate, page views, device distribution, referral source quality, payment method sharing status, and order pattern indicators

account_id.description: Unique identifier for the account to analyze

toolSpec.name: analyze_temporal_patterns
toolSpec.description: Retrieves temporal activity data including registration burst detection, off-hours activity percentage, activity spike detection, and coordinated timing patterns. Use this to identify time-based fraud indicators

account_id.description: Unique identifier for the account to analyze

toolSpec.name: get_violation_history
toolSpec.description: Retrieves detailed violation history including previous violations count, last violation date, warning status, rehabilitation status, and enforcement action history. Use this to assess repeat offender status and determine risk severity

toolSpec.name: get_financial_impact
toolSpec.description: Retrieves financial metrics including total lifetime revenue, refund rate percentage, and customer complaint count. Use this to calculate risk severity based on financial impact

toolSpec.name: determine_enforcement_action
toolSpec.description: Retrieves enforcement action guidelines that map violation types and risk severity levels to their corresponding actions. Use this after determining both the violation type from scoring analysis AND the risk severity level from financial/historical data
